'''majuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantioresolution|enantioresolution]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantioresolution|enantioresolution]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| majuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjiyith|mæjiyith]] || [[word:mæjiyij|mæjiyij]] || [[word:mæjiyish|mæjiyish]] || [[word:mæjiyi|mæjiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:majujuyuth|majujuyuth]] || [[word:majujuyuj|majujuyuj]] || [[word:majujuyush|majujuyush]] || [[word:majujuyu|majujuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:majuyuth|majuyuth]] || [[word:majuyuj|majuyuj]] || [[word:majuyush|majuyush]] || [[word:majuyu|majuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:majufyuth|majufyuth]] || [[word:majufyuj|majufyuj]] || [[word:majufyush|majufyush]] || [[word:majufyuf|majufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majuyuthu|majuyuthu]] || [[word:majuyuju|majuyuju]] || [[word:majuyushu|majuyushu]] || [[word:majuyuku|majuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majuyuth|majuyuth]] || [[word:majuyuj|majuyuj]] || [[word:majuyush|majuyush]] || [[word:majuyu|majuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majuyuthul|majuyuthul]] || [[word:majuyujul|majuyujul]] || [[word:majuyushul|majuyushul]] || [[word:majuyukul|majuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majuyuthuthu|majuyuthuthu]] || [[word:majuyujuju|majuyujuju]] || [[word:majuyushushu|majuyushushu]] || [[word:majuyuku|majuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majuyuthun|majuyuthun]] || [[word:majuyujun|majuyujun]] || [[word:majuyushun|majuyushun]] || [[word:majuyukun|majuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majuyuthuoro|majuyuthuoro]] || [[word:majuyujuoro|majuyujuoro]] || [[word:majuyushuoro|majuyushuoro]] || [[word:majuyukuoro|majuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
